title: Potato Upgrader
description: FPS boosting modpack for low-end computers/laptops
body:
## Not updated anymore
it's been fun to make a project like this and see so many people tune into it but I'm ending the modpack as it is. This pack will no longer receive any updates, I suggest looking into other modpacks for newer versions of Minecraft.

## Description
This is a fabric-based modpack aimed to improve your FPS immensely.\
This modpack is made for people with a low-end PC or laptop, like me :( _**(Not anymore woohoo!!)**_\
**Supports controllers**

_1.20.2 & 1.20.3 not recommended due to many mods not being updated for these versions._

### A Little Extra (Might be a waste of time for you)
This modpack wasn't just made for performance, It also adds a layer of immersion using refined sounds and shaders _(shaders are optional and depend on if your laptop/PC can handle it)_. That also includes some small details here and there like falling leaves, not enough animations, and more.\
It doesn't end there, using replaymod and camera utils _(1.20.1 exclusive)_, creating content or just some clips for you and your friends is lightwork.

### Client & Server (new modrinth environment settings)
**Client:** This modpack is mostly client-sided and targeted to be compatible with vanilla servers.

**Server:** Some performance mods have impact on server performance, only these mods should be downloaded on the server. ENTIRELY OPTIONAL

<details>
<summary>Confirmed server-side mods (will be looked into further)</summary>

- VMP (Very Many Players)
- ...

</details>

### How do the modpack versions work? 
**For easy reference, I will explain it like this: x.y.z (ex. 1.0.5)**

- x: **Major changes** to the modpack that may turn the future path of it entirely
- y: **New Minecraft versions** _Potato Upgrader will never get older version than 1.20.x_
- z: **Minor changes:** adding, updating or removing mods _(resets for every new MC version)_

<details>
<summary>Changelog notes</summary>

- #### 04/04/2024 (EU & USA)
  - **Xaero's worldmap was removed due to unexpected crashes, 1.3.1 has this problem** and maybe even more versions. _**This issue is fixed in both 1.0.6 (MC 1.20.1) and 1.3.2 (MC 1.20.4)** I will check if any other versions are broken and add these here_.


- #### 26/02/2024 (EU) | 02/26/2024 (USA)
  - _**I will only update the latest version of the modpack, as of right now this version is the latest, don't expect any updates on the other versions**_

  - **Best and most stable version yet just released!**
  
    - A few QOL mods were added
    - Many mods that couldn't make it to both 1.20.2 and 1.20.3 are now back

- #### 21/02/2024 (EU) | 02/21/2024 (USA)
  - **New version released!!**

    - Added:
      - Advancement plaques
      - Forge Config API Port
      - More Culling _(+ extra)_
    - Not Updated:
      - Advancement Info
      - Cull Leaves _(now done by More Culling)_
      - Dashloader
      - Model Gap Fix
    - Removed:
      - Camera Utils
      - LibIPN

- #### 11/11/2023 (EU & USA)
  - _Modpack has just been updated, it's now in 'release' Please make sure you download this version instead of any of the beta's (or the alpha version) Also make sure you download 1.0.4 or higher (essential mod included), not 1.0.3 (no essential mod)_

</details>
